name: Pumpkin Bread or Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, butter, and eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking powder, molasses, cloves, nutmeg, walnuts, honey, cream, and vanilla) to the bowl with pumpkin mixture. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Pour the batter into oiled loaf pans or muffin tins.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes, or until tops brown. For gifts, bake in oiled empty coffee or tea tins.
